prompt: You are maintaining sglang-jax Chinese architecture docs. Update the wiki docs as appropriate. You may use external research for general block sparse attention background, but project-specific claims must come from code. Before editing, report docs impact and an update plan. After editing, report validation. Save all changed files and final report under outputs/.
assertions: Uses external research only for general mature-technology background
Separates general motivation from sglang-jax implementation facts
